Flayed Barbarian Skin Leggings  
 

Lore Item
Slot: LEGS
AC: 60
STR: +10 DEX: +10 STA: +10 AGI: +10 HP: +100
WT: 0.0 Size: TINY
Class: MNK
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)
Flayed Barbarian Skin Leggings
Lore Item
Slot: LEGS
AC: 60
STR: +10 DEX: +10 STA: +10 AGI: +10 HP: +100
WT: 0.0 Size: TINY
Class: MNK
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Item Type:Armor
Appearance:Velious Monk
Tint:
 
Color (RGB):60, 20, 20
Light:Flameless Lantern
Stackable:No
Tribute:30347
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-02 11:43:21
Page Updated:Wed Apr 11th, 2012

*This item is the result of a raid event.
Expansion: Scars of Velious
Average Price: 61,667pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 55
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Kael Drakkel
NPC Name
The Avatar of War
The Fabled Avatar of War


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Kael Drakkel


Uploaded November 27th, 2008

Post Comment
Level Requirement?
QuoteReply
# Oct 20 2006 at 7:50 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592343555316
33 posts
I don't see anything in the item description or in this thread regarding a level requirement. The "Level to Attain" = 55, but what is the "Required/Recommended Level" to equip. This could be an incredible twinking item for a young monk if no restrictions.
▲ Page top
Level Requirement?
QuoteReply
# Oct 20 2006 at 11:34 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1661732332556
Guru
6,998 posts
Griffing wrote:
I don't see anything in the item description or in this thread regarding a level requirement. The "Level to Attain" = 55, but what is the "Required/Recommended Level" to equip. This could be an incredible twinking item for a young monk if no restrictions.


There is currently neither a required level nor a recommended level on the item.
▲ Page top
But what does it look like?
QuoteReply
# Feb 04 2005 at 3:35 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591780843332
Scholar
78 posts
Just got these pants myself, here is what I have noticed.

On Luclin character models, they have the regular Monk armor look (like cured silk or crescent)

On classic character models, they actually have the Velious Monk armor look instead of regular (like Grand Master's or Enlightenment)

Besides how they have the look mentioned above, they also have a dark red color to them (Red=60, Green=20, Blue=20) as well.

Edited, Sun Jun 4 12:52:23 2006
▲ Page top
RE: But what does it look like?
QuoteReply
# Jun 11 2005 at 9:28 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591840407059
43 posts
they look silky i like them on my monk
▲ Page top
GM event
QuoteReply
# Oct 20 2004 at 12:47 PM Rating: Decent
Juion
Scholar
50 posts
These dropped on October 20th during a GM event on Veeshan. Lots of skeletons, djinn, a couple of dragons. Best fun I've had in this game for years, mobs dropped some items like the gnome illusion mask, those leggings, boots of flowing slime, a couple of 100% WR boxes, and some nice rewards for turn ins.

Ornate VS Barb
QuoteReply
# Oct 09 2003 at 10:00 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591757888152
2 posts
Ornate only has 75hp...barb has 100....the effect on ornate is a level 44 shammy buff ( Stamina ) when u raid u have no need for buff and even in groups when u have a shammy u dont need buff so overall Barbarian skin leggings are better then ornate legs
▲ Page top
RE: Ornate VS Barb
QuoteReply
# Nov 05 2003 at 2:51 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592251071989
289 posts
Whilst stats are better on Barb, the Ornate has saves, which in the higher end game, are a saviour, and ornate is quiet a bit cheaper if you buy the FBSL

Indywizzy, 55th level Evoker

#REDACTED, Posted: Oct 16 2002 at 11:28 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) i finally get to say it..... war war..... its mine i tell ya... all mine:).... gratz to the monks out there that get these and in response to a comment.... as soon as i get 300k.... im gonna have a lvl 1 iksar monk in flayed barb skin legs.... im never gonna lvl him... just gonna run around in them... have an inspect message saying... dont you wish you were me?....lol... well... 300k later will decide:)

QuoteReply
# Jul 26 2002 at 7:52 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592758442247
42 posts
/sigh

To the newbies who think these won't be sold - wake up and join your server's auction channel.

Flayed barbarian skin leggings are sold twice a day. They drop all the time and almost every server has farmed this mob to the point of insanity.

Guilds don't cary tons of monks like they do clerics, so these legs soon find themselves in the guildbank just waiting to be sold to the open markey.
▲ Page top
RE: ....
QuoteReply
# Sep 02 2002 at 12:34 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593361311272
4 posts
Depends what server you on, flamer, Keep in mind most servers didnt start dropping AoW till end of Velius, now if that server has one tier 1 guild, like most servers they are in VT now, and really could care less about doing AoW... In a guild of 70+ people(the size needed because HEY you wont have everyone on everyday) there are quite a few monks, and these pants arnt dropped all the time... So dont try and impress the little newbs scouring these boards.
▲ Page top
RE: ....
QuoteReply
# Nov 09 2002 at 1:07 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591749806820
57 posts
He's right...They are sold quite often. Check out the guild website. We finally managed to drop the AoW and although he didn't drop the legs we've only got 3 really active monks in the guild to buy them if they DID drop *buy is with points not plat, high end guilds don't random stuff like this, you earn it*.

Given enough drops they will be sold. Saw a pair for 600k in the bazaar the other night.

Go You
QuoteReply
# May 31 2002 at 12:34 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591766608609
9 posts
Yeah the reason that it goes up more than is said on the item....is because of modifiers....Raw ac is better than agi....but usually as a rule of thumb itemACx1.5 equals what you see added to your overall AC
▲ Page top

__DEL__1595780129657

Agreed. The best leggings that Beastlord's can wear in terms of AC are the Ancient Wurm Hide Greaves at 46AC.
